title: 10 confirmed dead in Bondi Beach shooting
bodyText:
INTERNATIONAL NEWS - This morning, 14 December, 09:00  South African time and 18:00 in Sydney, Australia police responded to a mass shooting at Sydney's world-famous Bondi Beach.


> Various social media posts show video scenes of the attack, allegedly on a Hanukkah celebration event.


According to @jewishbreakingnews on Instagram, around 2 000 members of the Jewish community were attending the event.A report on www.aljazeera.com reveals that NSW police confirmed 10 people killed, one who is alleged to be one of the shooters, with a second shooter in critical condition.The report further states: "At this time, a further 11 people are reported to be injured, including two police officers."


## Watch a video on X.com here:



> This is one of the most heroic things I’ve ever seen. Risking his own life to save others. What an astounding act of courage. Who is this guy? https://t.co/w4X1yyxjqe


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
